description: Known API limitations across platforms that prevent automation or require workarounds

metadata_cache.description: Metadata describe cache has 2-5 minute delay after field/object creation
symptoms: Field not found errors immediately after creation
Formula fields not visible in describe

workarounds.description: Wait 2-5 minutes after field creation before querying
Use Tooling API which has lower cache TTL
Clear cache via Setup > Schema Settings (manual)

metadata_cache.prevention: Add 3-minute delay after field creation operations before dependent queries
metadata_cache.detection_pattern: Field .* not found|INVALID_FIELD|Could not resolve field

system_managed_fields.description: Certain fields are system-managed and cannot be set via API

FirstRespondedDate.reason: Set automatically when HasResponded becomes true
FirstRespondedDate.workaround: Create custom field Event_Attendance_Date__c for manual date tracking

EndDateTime.note: Either set EndDateTime OR DurationInMinutes, not both

CreatedById.reason: Set to running user at creation

system_managed_fields.detection_pattern: FIELD_INTEGRITY_EXCEPTION|field is not writeable|Cannot update|createable: false

quick_action_deployment.description: Quick Actions cannot be fully deployed via Metadata API
symptoms: Quick Action deploys but not visible on page layout
Quick Action exists but not assigned to any layout

workarounds.description: After deploy, manually add Quick Action to page layouts in Setup
Include Layout metadata with quickActionListItems in deployment

quick_action_deployment.prevention: Document manual steps in deployment runbook

flow_activation.description: Flows can be deployed but may need separate activation
symptoms: Flow version created but not active

workarounds.description: Use sf flow activate command after deployment

permission_set_group_assignment.description: Permission Set Group assignments may have propagation delay
affected_operations: Permission Set Group assignment to users
symptoms: User doesn't have expected permissions immediately after assignment
Permission changes not reflected in session

workarounds.description: Wait up to 20 minutes for propagation
Have user log out and back in

permission_set_group_assignment.prevention: Document expected propagation time in deployment plan

bulk_api_limits.description: Bulk API has specific limits on batches and records

workarounds.description: Split large operations into smaller batches

composite_api_limits.description: Composite API has limits on subrequests

limits.allOrNone_behavior: All subrequests succeed or all fail

workarounds.description: Split into multiple Composite API calls

territory2_object_naming.description: Territory2 objects have confusing naming - Territory2Rule does NOT exist, use ObjectTerritory2AssignmentRule instead

WRONG_ASSUMPTION.Territory2Rule: Does NOT exist as queryable object
WRONG_ASSUMPTION.TerritoryRule: Does NOT exist as queryable object

ObjectTerritory2AssignmentRule.description: Assignment rules that assign records to territories

ObjectTerritory2AssignmentRuleItem.description: Individual criteria items within assignment rules

Territory2.description: Territory records in a territory model

common_queries.list_assignment_rules: SELECT Id, DeveloperName, MasterLabel, IsActive, ObjectType FROM ObjectTerritory2AssignmentRule
common_queries.get_rule_criteria: SELECT Id, Field, Operation, Value FROM ObjectTerritory2AssignmentRuleItem WHERE RuleId = ':ruleId'
common_queries.list_territories: SELECT Id, Name, DeveloperName, ParentTerritory2Id FROM Territory2 WHERE Territory2ModelId = ':modelId'
common_queries.list_user_assignments: SELECT Id, UserId, Territory2Id, RoleInTerritory2 FROM UserTerritory2Association
common_queries.list_account_assignments: SELECT Id, ObjectId, Territory2Id, AssociationCause FROM ObjectTerritory2Association WHERE SobjectType = 'Account'

territory2_object_naming.prevention: Always use ObjectTerritory2AssignmentRule (not Territory2Rule) when working with territory assignment rules

territory2_operations.description: Territory2 rule operations have specific ordering and dependency requirements

sortorder_duplicate_value.description: Renumbering SortOrder in ascending order causes DUPLICATE_VALUE errors
sortorder_duplicate_value.workaround: Renumber in descending order (highest first) or use temporary values
sortorder_duplicate_value.example: To reorder items 1,2,3 to 3,1,2: First set to 103,101,102, then normalize

boolean_filter_clearing.description: BooleanFilter must be cleared before modifying rule items
boolean_filter_clearing.workaround: Set BooleanFilter to null, modify items, then restore filter

rule_deletion_dependency.description: Cannot delete rules that have territory associations
rule_deletion_dependency.workaround: First remove all ObjectTerritory2Association records, then delete rule

territory_name_not_updateable.description: Territory2.Name field is not updateable via Data API

rule_toggling_stale_assignments.description: Disabling/enabling rules doesn't clear stale account assignments
rule_toggling_stale_assignments.workaround: Manually run territory rules or delete stale ObjectTerritory2Association records

csv_bulk_api.description: CSV format requirements for Salesforce Bulk API operations

crlf_line_endings.description: Windows CRLF (\r\n) line endings cause Bulk API failures
crlf_line_endings.workaround: Convert to Unix LF (\n) before upload: sed -i 's/\r$//' file.csv
crlf_line_endings.detection: File shows ^M characters or Bulk API returns parsing errors

empty_values_clear_fields.description: Empty CSV values clear existing field values instead of skipping
empty_values_clear_fields.workaround: Use #N/A or remove column entirely to skip field updates
empty_values_clear_fields.note: This is intentional Salesforce behavior for data imports

state_country_picklist.description: State values require matching country for State/Country picklist fields
state_country_picklist.workaround: Always include both State and Country columns with valid ISO codes

international_state_validation.description: International state values may be rejected by US-configured picklist
international_state_validation.workaround: Check picklist configuration or use free-text address fields

field_length_limits.description: CSV values exceeding field length cause silent truncation or failure
field_length_limits.workaround: Pre-validate CSV against field describe metadata

sf_cli_deprecations.description: Salesforce CLI deprecated flags and changed behaviors

--json.note: Still supported but output format changed in v2
--json.workaround: Update parsing logic for new JSON structure

device_flow_sso.description: Device OAuth flow disabled for SSO-enabled orgs
device_flow_sso.workaround: Use web-based OAuth or JWT flow for SSO orgs
device_flow_sso.detection: INVALID_GRANT or OAuth flow fails for SSO users

file_operations.description: File system operations that commonly fail in automation

excel_file_lock.description: Excel holds exclusive lock on open files, preventing script writes
excel_file_lock.workaround: Close Excel before running scripts, or write to temp file and copy
excel_file_lock.detection: EBUSY or EACCES errors on .xlsx/.csv files

pdf_brand_css_path.description: PDF generator requires explicit path to brand CSS files
pdf_brand_css_path.detection: PDF generated with default styles instead of brand styles

silent_write_failures.description: Some file write operations fail silently without error
silent_write_failures.workaround: Always verify file exists and has expected content after write
silent_write_failures.detection: File missing or has zero bytes after 'successful' write

data_format_requirements.description: Data format requirements that commonly cause failures

user_id_vs_username.description: Assignment rules require User ID (005xx), not username (user@email.com)
user_id_vs_username.workaround: Always resolve username to User ID before creating assignments
user_id_vs_username.query: SELECT Id FROM User WHERE Username = 'user@email.com'

case_sensitivity.description: SOQL is case-insensitive but some string comparisons are case-sensitive
case_sensitivity.workaround: Use LOWER() or UPPER() for consistent comparisons

validation_rule_blocking.description: Validation rules can block API operations unexpectedly
validation_rule_blocking.workaround: Query validation rules before bulk operations to understand requirements

relationship_field_group_by.description: SOQL GROUP BY with relationship fields (e.g., Account.Name) returns null
relationship_field_group_by.workaround: Use subquery or join results in code
relationship_field_group_by.example: SELECT Account.Name, COUNT(Id) won't work - use apex/code to aggregate

api_rate_limits.description: HubSpot API has daily and per-second rate limits

network_timeout.description: Network timeouts can cause partial operation failures

workarounds.description: Design operations to be idempotent for safe retries
